## Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes introduced by this pull request, the motivation behind them, and the business/technical context.

Related Issue: Closes # (or N/A)

### Key Areas to Review
- **Sensitive Areas:** Describe any high-risk parts of the code changed (e.g., Silver deduplication windows, ClickHouse DDL schema changes).
- **New Dependencies:** List any new Python libraries, Spark packages, or external components introduced.
- **Files to Ignore:** List any files that can be skipped during review (e.g., autogenerated lockfiles, local data/ test files).

---

## Type of Change
Select all that apply:
- [ ] **Bug Fix** (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] **New Feature** (non-breaking change which adds pipeline or database functionality)
- [ ] **Breaking Change** (fix or feature that would alter existing schemas or outputs)
- [ ] **Data Quality / Validation** (adding checks, Great Expectations/Soda, or schema adjustments)
- [ ] **Performance Tuning** (optimizing Spark shuffles, ClickHouse primary keys, indices, or queries)
- [ ] **Infrastructure / IaC / CI-CD** (updating Dockerfiles, Docker Compose, Makefiles, GitHub workflows)
- [ ] **Refactoring / Tech Debt** (cleanup, reusability, configurations)
- [ ] **Documentation** (updates to README, DDL schema references, setup guides)

---

## Verification & Testing
Describe how you verified these changes. Provide exact commands, test inputs, SQL queries, or log outputs to help reviewers reproduce.

### Test Execution
* **Command run:** (e.g., `make run`, `make run_silver_prices`)
* **Environment:** (e.g., Local Python container `python_finance`, ClickHouse database client)

### Verification Outputs
* **Delta / Spark Verification:** (e.g., output of DataFrame check or Delta table history)
* **ClickHouse Verification SQL:**
  ```sql
  -- Run a query to show the schema or row counts are correct after change
  SELECT count(*), max(ingestion_timestamp) FROM stock_market.fact_prices;
  ```

---

## Schema, Quality & Code Checklist
- [ ] **Self-Review:** I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] **Code Comments:** I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand or complex areas.
- [ ] **No Warnings:** My changes do not generate new compilation or runtime warnings.
- [ ] **No Conflicts:** The branch is up-to-date with the base branch and has no merge conflicts.
- [ ] **DDL Updated:** If ClickHouse schemas were modified, the changes have been applied to `src/db_init/init.sql`.
- [ ] **Deduplication Maintained:** Spark/Silver deduplication logic has been verified (no duplicate records introduced).
- [ ] **Config / Secrets:** Any new environment variables have been documented in `.env.example`.

---

## Deployment & Backfill Checklist
- [ ] This change requires **no backfilling** of historical stock data.
- [ ] This change **requires a backfill/migration**. (If checked, reference the Backfill Issue or outline the date range and tickers scope below).

---

## Justification for Skipped Steps
*If you did not check one or more boxes in the checklist above, please explain why here. (Otherwise, you may delete this section).*
